title: Model Schema
description: Defines the characteristics, capabilities, and requirements of a language model

ModelVendor.description:
Available model vendors:
- openai: OpenAI models (e.g., GPT-4)
- anthropic: Anthropic models (e.g., Claude)
- meta: Meta AI models (e.g., Llama)
- google: Google models (e.g., PaLM)
- cohere: Cohere models
- unknown: Other or unspecified vendors

ModelType.description:
Types of model functionality:
- text: Text completion models
- chat: Conversational models
- image: Image generation/analysis models
- multi_modal: Models handling multiple modalities
- embedding: Text embedding models
- audio: Audio processing models

LicenseType.description:
Types of model licenses:
- apache_2_0: Apache License 2.0
- mit: MIT License
- proprietary: Commercial/proprietary license
- cc_by_sa: Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike
- other: Other license types

HostingType.description:
Model deployment options:
- cloud: Cloud-hosted deployment
- on_premise: Local deployment
- hybrid: Mixed deployment model

PricingType.description:
Pricing models:
- pay_per_call: Per-request pricing
- subscription: Fixed subscription fee
- free: No cost
- usage_based: Based on resource usage

QuantizationType.description:
Model quantization formats:
- fp16: 16-bit floating point
- int8: 8-bit integer
- int4: 4-bit integer
- none: No quantization

id.description: Unique identifier for the model instance

name.description: Human-readable name for identifying the model

description.description: Comprehensive description of the model's capabilities, use cases, and limitations

vendor.description: Provider or creator of the model

model_type.description: Primary type or category of the model

is_third_party.description: Whether the model is provided by a third-party vendor (true) or is self-hosted (false)

context_length.description: Maximum number of tokens the model can process in a single context window

supported_languages.description: ISO language codes for languages supported by the model

license_type.description: Type of license under which the model is distributed

hosting_type.description: Deployment and hosting configuration for the model

pricing_type.description: Pricing and billing model for using the model

capabilities.description: List of tasks and operations the model can perform

min_gpu_memory.description: Minimum GPU memory required for model operation in gigabytes

recommended_gpu_memory.description: Recommended GPU memory for optimal performance in gigabytes

quantization.description: Quantization format used for model weights

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the model was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification to the model

tags.description: Tags for categorizing and filtering models

performance_metrics.description: Model performance evaluation sets and metrics

training_data.description: Information about the model's training data
